metadata.title: About me | Andrea Losavio
metadata.description: Computer Engineer, graduated from Politecnico di Milano. Discover my journey, skills, and creative vision

hero.title: About <highlight>me</highlight>
hero.subtitle: Who I am, my journey, skills, and creative vision
hero.name: Andrea Losavio
hero.bio1: I am a <bold>Computer Engineer</bold> who graduated from <bold>Politecnico di Milano</bold> in 2019, registered with the professional board under number <link>34249</link>, section B. I have been passionate about programming since 2009, fascinated from an early age by the logic and structure behind software — exploring the fundamentals of programming, computer architecture, and algorithms.
hero.bio2: I began my professional journey in the IT consulting sector in 2018 and started working as a <bold>freelancer</bold> in early 2023. Today, I collaborate with companies and startups as a <bold>Software Engineer & Tech Partner</bold>, helping them develop high-quality digital products and grow through tailored technological solutions.
hero.bio3: In 2023, I designed and developed the <link>Fast Memo</link> app and website, currently available on both Android and iOS stores.

beyondCode.title: <highlight>Beyond</highlight> code
beyondCode.subtitle: What I do in my freetime when I'm not coding

experiences.title: <highlight>Experiences</highlight>
experiences.subtitle: An overview of my professional background

andrealosavio.description: As a freelance Software Engineer & Tech Partner, I work across web and mobile. I build modern frontend apps with React/Next.js, robust backends with Node.js and Express, and mobile apps with React Native and Expo SDK. I also design high-level architectures and help teams make strong technical decisions.
achievements: Developed Fast Memo, a cross-platform memo application built with React Native and Expo, featuring rich-text notes, checklists, category organization, Firebase cloud sync, and other lots of features. Open-source, available in 7 languages, and downloaded by over 1,000 users.
Built and maintained multiple open-source libraries—such as react-native-dialog and figma-node-query—providing reliable, developer-friendly tools adopted across the community.
Helped a client develop a strong brand identity that allowed them to reach a wider audience and attract more customers.
Supported a company in building a robust infrastructure, laying solid foundations for future projects.
Collaborated long-term with a company to develop some of the most widely used platforms today.
Assisted a startup during a critical product transition phase, ensuring a smooth evolution.
Helped a startup secure almost €2M investment round through product development and technical strategy.

minsait.description: During my time as an Adobe Experience Manager Developer, I contributed end-to-end to large-scale digital projects for major multinational clients. My work involved full-stack development across AEM, combining modern front-end engineering (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, jQuery) with robust back-end development using Java Sling and AEM core technologies.
achievements: Built scalable AEM components using HTML, CSS, JavaScript/jQuery, and Java Sling.
Improved UI performance and collaborated directly with clients on technical solutions.
Worked across Agile/Waterfall environments and supported technical decision-making.
Managed AEM Dispatchers and contributed to CI/CD pipelines (GitLab, Jenkins).

doing.description: During my time as an Adobe Experience Manager Developer, I focused on backend development with Java Sling, building and extending CIF components for a high-traffic e-commerce platform. I collaborated closely with the tech lead to make key architectural decisions and managed multi-site development using AEM's multitenant capabilities.
achievements: Implemented backend features in Java Sling and extended CIF components for a large e-commerce platform.
Supported architectural decisions with the tech lead and worked on multi-site AEM structures.
Handled AEM Dispatcher configuration and troubleshooting.

deloitte.description: During my time working with Adobe Experience Manager, I engineered both front-end experiences and backend systems that supported large-scale content platforms. I specialized in AEM 6.4, Java Sling, and CRM integrations, building reliable, high-performing components used daily by enterprise teams.
achievements: Delivered scalable CMS components using AEM (frontend + backend).
Collaborated closely with an international client, including periodic on-site work.
Built SPAs/MPAs with JavaScript, Handlebars, HTML/CSS, and HTL.
Managed testing, debugging, and integrations (CRM, SOQL).
Configured components, templates, workflows, and content authoring tools.

ibm.description: In this role, I contributed to both front-end and backend development across multiple projects and platforms, supporting application delivery and system migrations. I worked with several technologies and databases, helping improve internal tools and streamline existing workflows. I also participated in analysis, testing, and debugging to ensure stable, high-quality releases.
achievements: Developed Cordova-based mobile/desktop applications (JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3).
Supported backend migrations in C, C++, Java, and C#, and worked with Oracle DB.
Performed PDF manipulation with FrameMaker and executed multi-level testing.
Built internal dealer-facing applications and contributed to technical analysis.
